GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.StickyTransformationFeature1: Symbol Transformation Feature can be triggered randomly on any main game spin.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.StickyTransformationFeature2: During the Symbol Transformation Feature, 3 to 15 symbol positions will be randomly selected and a randomly selected symbol (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) will be added to those symbol positions.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierFeature1: Multiplier Feature can be triggered randomly on any  spin.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierFeature2: During the Multiplier Feature, a multiplier between x2 to x100 will be awarded before wins are paid.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature1: 3 or more Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature2: At the start of Free Spins Feature, all Scatter symbols from the triggering main game spin will be transform into Sticky symbol.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature3: At every free spin, all of the sticky symbol(s) will reveal a randomly selected symbol (excluding Scatter symbol and Wild symbol).
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature4: When all of the reels stop spinning, any symbol on the reels that matches with the sticky symbol will be transformed into a sticky symbol for the rest of the remaining free spins.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature5: There can be at most 16 sticky symbols on the reels during the Free Spins Feature.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FreeSpinFeature6: 3 free spin is awarded for each +3 Free Spin symbol on the reels (if any).
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.MaxWinFeature1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.MaxWinFeature2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FeatureBuyFeature1: Tap on Feature Buy button to open the Feature Buy menu.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.FeatureBuyFeature2: Tap on Start button to buy the Free Spins Feature at the price displayed in the Feature Buy menu.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinningLineFeature1: Only the highest win per bet line is paid.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinningLineFeature2: Bet lines win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right or from the topmost row to the bottom.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter Symbol.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Simultaneous wins on different bet lines are added.
GraffitiRushPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

GraffitiRushRules.GeneralRules1: Graffiti Rush is a 4-reel, 4-row video slot featuring sticky symbol feature and multiplier up to x100.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.5 to 50.
